Choose the right option to fill in the gap in the following sentence.

“A number of _____ submitted the assignment”.
Which is not an antonym of the word 'eternal'?
Each girl and each boy ____ paid the money. Choose the correct option.
Choose the correct spelling.
I wish I _____ a child again.
Among these sentences, which one has a causative verb?
options_html: The doctor lays the boy on the bed.
correct_answer_html: The doctor lays the boy on the bed.

question_html: You don't like gossiping and ____ do I.
Which of the following sentences is correct?
options_html: I will call you if I had free time.
I would have called you if I had free time.
I would have called you if I had had free time.
I would call you if I have free time.
correct_answer_html: I would have called you if I had had free time.

question_html: He is hard working and _______.
It is essential that the patient ____ medicine regularly.
Which one is not an adverb?
‘All hats and no cows’ refers to-
The passive form of ‘She plucked some flowers’ is-
options_html: Some flowers are plucked by her.
Some flowers were plucked by her.
Some flowers had been plucked by her.
correct_answer_html: Some flowers were plucked by her.

question_html: Change the narration: He told me, "What is your name?"
options_html: He asked what my name is.
He asked what was my name.
He asked what my name was.
correct_answer_html: He asked what my name was.

question_html: Make it interrogative: “He is nothing but a liar.”
options_html: Is he anything but a liar?
What else is he but a liar?
He is nothing but a liar?
correct_answer_html: Is he anything but a liar?
